name: hindsight-memory
description: Manages long-term agent memory using the Hindsight framework (Retain, Recall, Reflect). Extracts facts, user preferences, and observations from chat history to update memory/hindsight_memories.json, queries relevant context, and consolidates insights. Use when the user requests memory retrieval, fact extraction, reflection, updating preferences, or invokes '/hindsight'.
examples: What do you remember about the brand kit we built last session?
Run hindsight reflection to update my profile
